arts.ttl: Newcastle United dealt fresh injury blow as 6ft 2in £20m man finally makes his debut
arts.sum: Martin Dubravka was left in a sorry state after a crunch challenge from Omar Bugiel at the end of the first half. When analysing Bugiel's challenge on Dubravka, BBC 5 Live summariser Pat Nevin said: "You've got to say if you're a centre-forward, Omar Bugiel, you've kind of got to go for that one."

arts.ttl: Newcastle United St James' Park decision expected imminently with 'all options open'
arts.sum: A club spokesman today insisted that all options are open for the Magpies and that no final decision had or would yet be made on whether a move was on the cards or simply redevelopment. "What I will say is the product you see today, the STACK, this is just an indication of the ambition and the commitment and the dedication that the ownership and everybody within the club has got, not just to Newcastle United, but to the region as well.

arts.ttl: 'You are better than that': Chris Sutton slams the actions of Newcastle's Anthony Gordon
arts.sum: Newcastle United have been inconsistent since the start of the season, with the team yet to hit their groove and find the right notes. But...

arts.ttl: Report: Newcastle lead Juventus in race to sign 'one of the best strikers in the world'
£500m-valued takeover could see Wolves eclipse Newcastle United - Kieran Maguire
Newcastle United 25-26 Home Kit to Combine Classic Stripes With a Unique Twist
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can exclusively leak early details of Newcastle United FC's 2025-26 home uniform, which will feature a classic striped design with a unique twist.

arts.ttl: Newcastle told Erling Haaland oversight is 'the exact same' as Magpies star
arts.sum: Speaking to The Football Fill-In podcast, Foster's co-host Tom Ochoa claimed Newcastle United' s Nick Pope does not get the praise he deserves because of his stature between the posts. Former Manchester United shot stopper Ben Foster has drawn comparisons with Man City striker Erling Haaland and an unlikely Magpies star.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon outstrips Liverpool, Man United and Arsenal stars with priceless contribution
arts.sum: Gordon was arguably Newcastle's best player last season, and is one of the key players behind ambitious plans for the future at St James' Park, and when you compare his contribution to other in his position around the Premier League, it's clear to see why. Newcastle United and Anthony Gordon are close to agreeing a contract extension which will see the England winger become one of the club's highest earners.

arts.ttl: Shearer includes Newcastle star ahead of Anthony Gordon in TOTW, also hails two Leicester players
arts.sum: There was no Anthony Gordon however...

arts.ttl: Gateshead FC rocked by Rob Elliot exit as ex-Newcastle United keeper joins Crawley Town
arts.sum: The former Republic of Ireland international will be joined Broadfield Stadium by Heed player-assistant manager Louis Storey and first-team coach Anthony Sweeney after the trio travelled to Sussex after overseeing a final training sessions with the Gateshead squad on Monday morning. Elliot, player assistant manager Louis Storey and Heed head of recruitment Luke Clark were forced into a mid-season rebuild of their squad after several loan signings were recalled by parent clubs and key forward Stephen Wearne followed Williamson to Milton Keynes.
